input.topic: CyberAv3ngers IRGC-Affiliated ICS and Water Sector Targeting Campaign
input.notes: Iranian IRGC-affiliated threat group (CyberAv3ngers / IRGC Cyber-Electronic Command) conducting targeted attacks against industrial control systems and water/wastewater utilities using default credentials on Unitronics PLCs. Active 2023-2024, with victims spanning the US, Israel, Ireland, and other nations. Multi-sector ICS targeting campaign with clear government attribution (FBI/CISA/NSA/EPA joint advisory AA23-335A). Bounded scope: distinct from broader Iranian state-sponsored incident articles and from Predatory Sparrow industrial attacks. Conservative attribution: IRGC-affiliated confirmed by US government; no internal IRGC sub-unit attribution required.

history.note: Renumbered from TASK-2026-0236 to TASK-2026-0259 to resolve ID conflict: origin/main e98daf7 introduced TASK-2026-0236 as an incident task (Canvas/ShinyHunters). PR #543 (open, clean) occupies IDs 0237-0258. Assigned next clean IDs 0259 and 0260 for the two campaign seeds.
Opened PR #602: feat(campaign): TASK-2026-0259 — CyberAv3ngers IRGC-Affiliated ICS and Water Sector Targeting Campaign

Applied Ernest Penfold R1 blockers: (1) endDate corrected from 2024-04-30 to 2023-12-01 — sources support Nov–Dec 2023 only; (2) removed unsupported 2024 timeline section. Fixed remaining Gemini inline findings: removed 'straightforward', 'meaningful'→'demonstrable', 'prominently'→'publicly confirmed', 'perceived' removed.
